ground_truth.title: Top Machine Learning Companies in the USA - Top Picks for 2025
ground_truth.author: Anastasiya Zharovskikh
ground_truth.main_content: A myriad of machine learning initiatives are being deployed annually across diverse sectors. Such intensity requires significant demand for expertise in this field. Building an in-house team that obtains special technology skills is a resource-intensive and challenging task. Hence, the call for external machine learning consulting has surged. These vendors bring both technical expertise and project alignment with business goals. Companies can achieve sustainability and efficiency without the burden of maintaining an in-house team. The article profiles 15 top machine learning companies in the USA: InData Labs (Miami, Florida, founded 2014), FS Studio (Broomfield, Colorado, founded 2011), The SilverLogic (Boca Raton, Florida, founded 2012), HatchWorks AI (Atlanta, Georgia, founded 2016), Black Widow Tech (Austin, Texas, founded 2017), Six Feet Up (Fishers, Indiana, founded 1999), Darwoft (Portland, Oregon, founded 2010), Digital Scientists (Alpharetta, Georgia, founded 2007), Materialize Labs (Los Angeles, California, founded 2018), Hypotenuse Labs (San Francisco, California, founded 2018), TXI (Chicago, Illinois, founded 2002), 3Advance (Arlington, Texas, founded 2010), Mojotech (Providence, Rhode Island, founded 2008), Rocket Farm Studios (Needham, Massachusetts, founded 2008), and Twenty Ideas (Eugene, Oregon, founded 2014). The article provides guidance on selecting machine learning service providers, emphasizing factors such as technical expertise, industry knowledge, portfolio quality, ongoing support capabilities, customer reviews, and regulatory compliance.
with: A myriad of machine learning initiatives are being deployed annually across diverse sectors.
Hence, the call for external machine learning consulting has surged.
Below, you can find an impressive list of the top machine learning companies in the USA that can navigate you in the complex landscape of AI development.
The US market is home to a vast number of machine learning consulting companies showing high excellence.
These vendors guide clients through every stage of the process, from initial goal-setting to the full implementation of ML models.
